Kristian López

Software Architect · Staff Engineer

Experience

Staff Software Engineer

Leading tech company

2023 – present
  • • Designed event-driven microservices processing 1M+ daily transactions
  • • Led migration from monolith to bounded-context services on AWS EKS
  • • Established hexagonal architecture standards across 3 engineering teams
  • • Reduced deployment lead time from 2 days to 45 minutes via GitOps

Senior Software Architect

Fintech startup

2021 – 2023
  • • Architected POS and payments platform for 50+ restaurant locations
  • • Implemented CQRS + Event Sourcing with Vert.x for the order domain
  • • Built CFDI 4.0 compliance pipeline achieving 99.97% success rate
  • • Grew engineering team from 3 to 12 engineers

Software consultancy

  • • Built REST APIs and microservices for healthcare and logistics clients
  • • Introduced DDD patterns to a legacy Java codebase (500k lines)
